name: O.R.C. Weevil
description: The O.R.C. Weevil stops being passive prey and becomes a walking explosive. It is still small and fragile, but its whole role now is to force you to respect the detonation.
behavior: It moves through short O.R.C. patrol lanes and only looks harmless at a distance. Instead of fleeing like a normal weevil, it tries to get as close as possible before blowing up.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight, but its real danger is not a combo, it is the blast radius. It is very easy to underestimate while you are already busy with larger enemies.
interactionWithCreatures: It functions as a disposable unit in O.R.C. waves, rushing in to break formations or punish players who stay still.
strategy: It is never worth leaving alive. Kill it from range or finish it quickly and step away before the blast, especially if other enemies are forcing you to stay in the same spot.

abilities.name: Explosion
abilities.description: It rushes near the target and detonates once it dies or reaches the right distance.
